required_preferences.fact: Now allocates 9-11am for interdisciplinary symposium coordination and faculty meetings, temporarily pausing exclusive personal research blocks until the presentation is complete

supersedes.fact: Strictly blocks out 9-11am for personal research — never schedules teaching or meetings during that time

required_preferences.fact: Avoids extended typing altogether; switches to voice dictation and handwritten notes for research or teaching prep, only resumes typing after ergonomic adjustments pass therapist's review

supersedes.fact: Uses a wrist brace for all laptop work — never types for over 45 minutes straight without taking a stretch break

required_preferences.fact: Tracks her sleep and stress using a German health app, never uses US-based trackers
Always video calls her family on Sunday afternoons, never switches to audio-only even under weak connection
Prefers out-loud brainstorming and collaborative whiteboard sessions for group project work, avoiding shared digital docs until ergonomic upgrades are complete
Spends free evenings reading climate fiction in German, never in English

persona: An international PhD candidate in environmental science
